summary: Created SessionDiffPanel.tsx — a 'Changes' tab in the right panel that reads all tool calls from session messages (edit, write, apply_patch, multiedit), aggregates diffs per file (latest diff wins for repeated edits), shows +N/-N line counts, provides expand/collapse all controls, renders unified diffs via the existing DiffViewer component, and guards large diffs (>500 lines) behind a 'Show large diff' reveal button. Wired into RightPanel as a new 'changes' tab with FileDiff icon and a badge showing the count of modified files. Added 'changes' to the RightPanelTab union type in layout-dialogs.ts. Exported SessionDiffPanel from the panels index.
